message:
refactor(monitor): improve EWMA smoothing, PID tuning, and predictive model accuracy

Refines the monitoring subsystem: updates EWMA filter coefficients for
better signal smoothing, further tunes the PID controller parameters,
and improves the predictive model's accuracy calculations from concurrent
agent optimization work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
